TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan, title = Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay nqu tay , Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw United arab emirates ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay nqu tay , Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw United arab emirates ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , kħali*a βin zaje* al naħjan, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw unite* araβ emirates~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kħali*a βin zaje* al naħjan, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
